summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by adding an Admin link/button to the Layout component (frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx) in both the desktop navigation and the mobile hamburger menu, styled with the brand-orange color and a Shield icon. A footer Admin Portal link is also mentioned in the file summary. All acceptance criteria appear to be met: the link is visible on every page (via Layout), navigates to /admin, uses the deep charcoal + electric orange palette, and is present in both desktop and mobile layouts.
